title: elymus ciliaris var. hirtiflorus
intro: Elymus ciliaris var. hirtiflorus, also known as the hairy-fruited wheat-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elymus ciliaris var. hirtiflorus are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
